title: Trigger automation with multiple status triggers

posts.author: Yuvaly (Yuval)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

some items have multiple status columns. it would be great if the same automation/workflow will allow to set more then one status columns as a trigger.
use case example - we have a flow that require a few organizational functions approval. if any of them don’t approve, i have an automation to move the item to a “non approved requests” group. currently i need to create an automation for each of the approvers. if i had multiple status trigger this can be solved.
many other scenarios for that same issue - and probably relevant for other columns.
Thanks
